CustomField.description: The default value for the flag if no strategies are defined. If true, the flag is ON by default. If false, it's OFF by default. This field is *only* used when the 'Feature Flag Strategies' related list is empty.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Controls the flag's value when no strategy rules exist. Check this to have the feature be ON by default. Leave it unchecked for the feature to be OFF by default.
CustomField.label: Is Enabled By Default
